name: Keeper Security
description: Monitor Keeper Security enterprise vault users, teams, and access controls via SCIM API

credentialFields.label: SCIM Provisioning Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate from Keeper Admin Console > Admin > Node > Provisioning > Add Method > SCIM

credentialFields.label: SCIM Node ID
credentialFields.helpText: Numeric Node ID shown on the SCIM setup page in Keeper Admin Console

credentialFields.label: Data Center Region
credentialFields.helpText: US, EU, AU, JP, CA, or GOV (e.g. US for keepersecurity.com, EU for keepersecurity.eu)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Keeper vault users provisioned via SCIM and verifies their active or locked status

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that Keeper enterprise SCIM provisioning is active, confirming centralized identity governance required for 2FA policy enforcement

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Keeper teams and roles are configured with assigned members for organized vault access control

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies that Keeper vault users are assigned to teams for controlled, team-based access to shared secrets and folders
